error_Diagnosis: Verify encoder cable connection
Verify if encoder wiring is correct
error_Solution: Make sure encoder cable properly connected

error_Diagnosis: Verify L1,L2,L3 terminal voltage
error_Solution: Increase main power supply voltage, Secure connections

error_Diagnosis: Verify motor power cable wiring
error_Solution: Measure resistance values between U, V, W terminals, make sure the values are almost equal. If not, might be due to damaged motor or motor winding open circuit.

error_Cause: Motor velocity out of control, Excessive velocity error
error_Diagnosis: Verify encoder phase sequence; Verify if UVW cable is connected to the right terminal
error_Solution: Reconnect UVW if wrongly connected. If still remains unsolved, please contact technical support.

error_Cause: The RxPDO update timeout in operational state
error_Solution: 1. Verify if EL7EC network is connected 2. Verify RxPDO update time

error_Cause: The input data is not updated for more than 1 second
error_Diagnosis: The current state is maintained below the safe operation, and the operation state is switched to the safe operation state
error_Solution: 1. Verify if TxPDO is valid  2. Verify master device synchronization settings

error_Cause: Output data is not updated for more than 1 second
error_Diagnosis: The current state is maintained below the safe operation, and the operation state is switched to the safe operation state
error_Solution: 1. Verify if RxPDO is valid 2. Verify master device synchronization settings

error_Cause: Motor or encoder cable wiring error
error_Diagnosis: Verify if actual load exceeds maximum value allowed
Look for mechanical vibration from machine system
Verify motor and encoder wiring
Verify holding brake terminal voltage
error_Solution: 1. Adjust gain value of control loop 2. Increase duration time for acceleration and deceleration
1. Reconnect wiring 2. Replace motor and encoder cable

error_Cause: Motor rotor blocking time threshold value too low
error_Diagnosis: Look for mechanical blockages
Verify value of Pr6.57
Verify if value of Pr_014 is too low
Verify if values of Pr1.00 & Pr1.05 are too low
Verify if values of Pr0.13 & Pr5.22 are too low
1. Verify if acceleration and deceleration duration time is too low. 2. Verify if rotational velocity is too high 3. Verify if load is too large
error_Solution: 1. Increase duration time for acceleration and deceleration 2. Decrease rotational velocity 3. Decrease load

error_Diagnosis: Verify if Pr0.03 is too large
Verify L1,L2,L3 terminal voltage

error_Cause: L1C, L2C connected when USB cable is connected
error_Diagnosis: Verify L1,L2,L3 terminal voltage
Control circuit power on before driver initialization. Alarm might occur.
error_Solution: Please disconnect the USB cable before powering on control circuit.
